name: Value Driver Tree
description: Decompose a north-star metric into the sub-metrics that drive it
systemPromptHint: Every node should represent a measurable metric, not an activity. The math must hold: parent values should equal the sum or product of their children (respecting the operator). Use leading/lagging tags to distinguish predictive from outcome metrics. Populate value and unit fields whenever the user provides numbers.

junctionOptions.label: Add
junctionOptions.description: Children are summed (use edge polarity to subtract)

junctionOptions.label: Multiply
junctionOptions.description: Children are multiplied (use edge polarity to divide)

nodeTags.name: Leading Indicator
nodeTags.description: A predictive metric you can influence before outcomes materialize

nodeTags.name: Lagging Indicator
nodeTags.description: An outcome metric that reflects past performance

derivedIndicators.name: North Star
derivedIndicators.description: No incoming edges — the top-level metric everything rolls up to

derivedIndicators.name: Driver
derivedIndicators.description: Has both incoming and outgoing edges — an intermediate roll-up metric

derivedIndicators.name: Actionable Metric
derivedIndicators.description: No outgoing edges — a metric teams can directly influence
